name: agentdb
description: AgentDB plugins for Claude Code — vector memory, episodic recall, causal graph, RL routing, all backed by the agentdb npm package

plugins.name: agentdb-core
plugins.description: Foundation plugin — pattern store, search, stats. Surfaces agentdb_pattern_store, agentdb_pattern_search, agentdb_pattern_stats.

plugins.name: agentdb-memory
plugins.description: Episodic replay (Reflexion) + skill library. /remember and /recall slash commands; agentdb-curator agent for nightly consolidation.

plugins.name: agentdb-causal
plugins.description: Causal graph + hierarchical memory. /link and /explain-link slash commands; agentdb-investigator agent for root-cause traversal.

plugins.name: agentdb-learning
plugins.description: RL + Thompson Sampling bandit. 9 algorithms (Q-Learning, PPO, MCTS, etc.); /learn-task and /route-task slash commands.

plugins.name: agentdb-graph
plugins.description: Graph queries — Cypher execution, k-hop traversal, hyperedge search.

plugins.name: agentdb-search
plugins.description: Advanced retrieval — MMR diversity rerank, explainable recall, metadata filters, hybrid search.
